message:
feat(geodesic): Add exact solver acceptance criteria tests (bd-28sb)

- Add 11 new tests verifying all bd-28sb acceptance criteria:
  - AC-1: exact solver cost <= Foata-flatten cost (8 trace shapes)
  - AC-2: returned schedule is a valid linear extension (all tests)
  - AC-3: exhaustive brute-force comparison for n<=10 (8 shapes)
  - Heuristic admissibility verification
  - Deterministic output across 10 repeated runs
- Fix clippy lints in other agents' code (systematic.rs, fixtures.rs,
  three_lane.rs, homology_benchmark.rs, cancel_drain_bench.rs,
  shared_handle_test.rs)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
